name: Key Lime Pie (Diabetic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over lime juice and let it stand for 1 minute.
2. Add boiling water and sweetener to the gelatin mixture and stir until gelatin is dissolved. Refrigerate about 45 minutes or until slightly thickened.
3. Combine milk and vanilla, then freeze for 30 minutes.
4. Remove from freezer and whip at high speed until stiff. Stir lime juice and food coloring into whipped milk.
5. Slowly blend the gelatin mixture into whipped milk.
6. Spoon pie filling into crust. Chill until firm.
7. Garnish with lime zest and lime slices. Cut into 8 even portions and serve 1 portion per serving.
